<robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"$fdId$","fieldText":"$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"sid","defaultValue":""},{"field":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$fdId$","fieldText":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"process_url","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_xfgs$","fieldText":"$销方公司$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gsdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"return ($fdId$+\"3\").replace($fdId$,\"\");","fieldText":"return ($ID$+\"3\").replace($ID$,\"\");","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fply","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$receiptType$","fieldText":"$发票类型$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fplxdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$buyerCompanyName$","fieldText":"$名 称$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfnsrmc","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$buyerTaxNo$","fieldText":"$税 号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfnsrsbh","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$remarks$","fieldText":"$备注$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"bz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$detailList$","fieldText":"$明细表1$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"mx","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[{"field":"httpCode","fieldText":"请求code","dataType":"String","fieldName":"code"},{"field":"httpmsg","fieldText":"http返回信息","dataType":"String","fieldName":"msg"}],"restfulUrl":"http://xapi.db.ad01.sec.com/apigateway/SEDTFITOOL/dce-api/sedtfitool-service/pmp/api/invoice_kp/fplr?X-Sec-App-Auth-Key=78fd2d012463b58d3e880645a74015bd","successParam":{"successFieldName":"state","successValue":"200"},"dataFieldName":"oaData"}" id="N8" name="表单数据" unid="*@Robot@restRobotNode" x="400" y="800"/>

<robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"$fdId$","fieldText":"$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"sid","defaultValue":""},{"field":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$fdId$","fieldText":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"process_url","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_xfgs$","fieldText":"$销方公司$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gsdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"return ($fdId$+\"3\").replace($fdId$,\"\");","fieldText":"return ($ID$+\"3\").replace($ID$,\"\");","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fply","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$流程管理.获取流程表单指定控件的附件$($fdId$,\"fd_files\")","fieldText":"$流程管理.获取流程表单指定控件的附件$($ID$,\"fd_files\")","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"file","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[{"field":"httpCode","fieldText":"请求code","dataType":"String","fieldName":"code"},{"field":"httpmsg","fieldText":"http返回信息","dataType":"String","fieldName":"msg"}],"restfulUrl":"http://xapi.db.ad01.sec.com/apigateway/SEDTFITOOL/dce-api/sedtfitool-service/pmp/api/invoice_kp/file_import?X-Sec-App-Auth-Key=78fd2d012463b58d3e880645a74015bd","successParam":{"successFieldName":"state","successValue":"200"},"dataFieldName":"oaData"}" id="N9" name="文件数据" unid="*@Robot@restRobotNode" x="600" y="800"/>
